title: Experiencing Delays with App Approval on the monday.com Marketplace
excerpt: Is anyone else experiencing delays in getting their app approved for the monday.com marketplace? We’ve been eagerly waiting, but the process seems to be taking much longer than we anticipated. I’m curious if this is a co…

posts.author: bafaro (bafaro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is anyone else experiencing delays in getting their app approved for the monday.com marketplace? We’ve been eagerly waiting, but the process seems to be taking much longer than we anticipated. I’m curious if this is a common experience among other developers, or if there’s something specific we might be missing.

If you’ve faced similar delays, how did you manage them? Were there any particular steps or communications that helped move things along?

I’d love to hear your thoughts and experiences on this.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
It takes a long time. I’d expect a month or two minimum for your first time through the process.

They only look at your responses once every day or two.

posts.author: harryruth4 (Patrikowilsn)
posts.cookedHtml: They only look at your responses once every day or two.
